overall.description: A static cinematic shot of a modern bedroom interior with a large bed overlooking a rainy, futuristic cityscape through floor-to-ceiling windows. The scene features warm interior lighting contrasting with the gray, rain-soaked cyberpunk city exterior visible outside.

segments.scene_description: A static view of a modern, dimly lit bedroom with a large bed in the foreground. Floor-to-ceiling windows reveal a rainy, futuristic cityscape with a palm tree visible against the gray sky. Warm interior lighting contrasts with the cool, hazy exterior atmosphere, creating a cozy cyberpunk ambiance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static, cinematic perspective of a modern bedroom that emphasizes the contrast between a cozy interior and a bleak, futuristic exterior. It begins with a view of a dimly lit room where a large bed sits in the foreground, enveloped in warm ambient lighting. As the eye moves toward the background, the scene opens up through floor-to-ceiling windows to reveal a rain-soaked cyberpunk cityscape. The atmosphere then shifts from the interior warmth to a cool, hazy gray, highlighting a solitary palm tree standing against the oppressive urban sky.
